title: Team Workspace
freeDesc: Create teams/departments, assign menu access permissions, and register team members.
noTeams: No teams created yet. Enter a team/department name above to create one.
teamInputPh: Enter team/department name (e.g. Marketing, Sales, Operations)
paidBannerDesc: Live data integration and automation fully available. Set menu permissions per team and assign login credentials to members.
permDesc: Select the menus this team can access from the menus available in your current plan ({plan}).
fbPermSaved: Menu access permissions have been saved.
confirmDeleteTeam: Delete this team? Member data will also be deleted.
upgradeTeamDesc: Team Workspace is available on paid plans.
upgradeFeatureDesc: This feature is available on paid plans.
upgradeDiff: After payment, live data integration, automation, and Team Workspace are activated immediately.
paymentNote: Applied immediately upon payment. Cancel anytime.
guideSub: Learn how to effectively use Team Workspace
guideStep1Desc: Enter a team/department name in the input field above and click Create Team. Create teams that match your organization structure such as Marketing, Sales, Operations.
guideStep2Desc: Click the Permissions button on each team to select which menus the team can access. Only menus included in your current plan can be selected.
guideStep3Desc: Click Add Member on each team to set name, login ID, password, email, and role. Members log in independently with their assigned login ID.
guideStep4Desc: Control data access granularly through 4 roles: Viewer (read-only), Analyst, Editor, and Team Manager.
guideStep5Desc: Click the rename button or double-click to change team names. When deleting a team, member data is also deleted.
guideStep6Desc: Check your current plan, max accounts, and remaining accounts in the plan info at the bottom. If you need more accounts, upgrade via the Change Plan button.
guideTipDesc: Divide teams by department and grant only necessary menu permissions to each team. This improves both security and work efficiency simultaneously.
